scenario.name: Carrier From Only No SDP
scenario.send: INVITE sip:800@lab.local SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:971509876543@etisalat.local>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:800@lab.local> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:carrier@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

ACK sip:800@lab.local SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:carrier@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
